post.title: CFD Engineer - Wind Energy
post.job_description: We are looking for a CFD Engineer to work on wind-turbine airfoil, blade, and wind-resource simulations. The role requires OpenFOAM, RANS turbulence modeling, boundary-layer transition, separation and stall analysis, validation against wind-tunnel data, Python/Bash automation, Linux/HPC workflows, and clear engineering reporting.

core_skills.skills_list: RANS, external aerodynamics, thermal CFD, multiphase CFD, validation, post-processing
OpenFOAM setup, solver workflows, C++ customization, validation cases
SST, k-omega, k-epsilon, transition modeling, wall functions, separation and stall
Airfoils, wind-resource workflows, ABL modeling, wind-farm simulations
Mesh quality checks, structured setup review, case preparation, Fluent/OpenFOAM meshes
Wind-tunnel comparison, experimental correlation, sensitivity studies, error diagnosis
Python/Bash pre-processing, batch execution, post-processing, plots, reports
Linux clusters, parametric runs, job logs, restart workflows, large simulation campaigns
Assumptions, setup choices, validation summaries, engineering recommendations

bullets.description: Validated airfoil CFD results against wind-tunnel data and literature references.
Analyzed boundary-layer transition, separation, and stall behavior in airfoil simulations.
Automated airfoil case setup, execution, post-processing, and report generation.
Integrated OpenFOAM workflows into a commercial wind-engineering platform.
Developed atmospheric-boundary-layer wall-function workflows for wind CFD.
Improved post-processing repeatability for wind-resource simulation outputs.
Taught OpenFOAM case setup, boundary conditions, and solver workflow basics.
Taught CFD validation practices, setup discipline, and interpretation of results.

selected_projects.label: Wind Airfoil Campaigns
selected_projects.description: Automated CFD campaigns for wind-turbine airfoils, including meshing, RANS setup, transition studies, validation plots, and reporting.

selected_projects.label: OpenFOAM Transition Models
selected_projects.description: OpenFOAM turbulence and transition-model development with C++ changes, validation cases, and CI-backed review.

selected_projects.label: Wind Farm Solver Tooling
selected_projects.description: Simulation tooling for wind-farm CFD workflows, atmospheric boundary-layer setup, cloud execution, and repeatable post-processing.
